title: Say It with Songs
writer: Darryl F. Zanuck, Harvey Gates, Joseph Jackson
actors: Al Jolson, Davey Lee, Marian Nixon
plot: Joe Lane kills another man in a fistfight after learning that the man has made improper advances towards his wife. Joe goes to prison for the murder. When Joe gets out of prison, he visits his son "Little Pal" at school. Little Pa...
